items.statcast_observation: Maikel Garcia produced the hardest tracked Royals contact: 106.8 mph at a -20.0 degree launch angle.
items.summary: The Royals lost to the Chicago White Sox, KC 2, CWS 6. Luinder Avila led the night, working 2.0 innings with 0 earned runs, 2 strikeouts and 2 walks. Maikel Garcia supplied the loudest Royals contact at 106.8 mph.
items.title: Royals at White Sox Recap
